items.title: Apple releases security fix for older iPhones and iPads to protect against DarkSword attacks
items.content: The security update protects a raft of older iPhones and iPads from attacks linked to leaked hacking tools called DarkSword.

items.title: Apple will hide your email address from apps and websites, but not cops
items.content: Demands for Apple customer records by federal agents in recent months underscore the privacy limitations of email.

items.title: These iPad apps will make you wish you had more free time
items.content: We’ve compiled a list of some of the best iPad apps for creativity that are available on the App Store.

items.title: Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware
items.content: The tech giant's claim that it has not seen any successful spyware attacks targeting Apple devices with Lockdown Mode enabled comes amid a leak of hacking tools targeting user

items.title: Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use
items.content: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

items.title: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers. What could go wrong?
items.content: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.

items.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
items.content: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

items.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
items.content: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

items.title: Jamie Dimon Cites Risks From War, Private Credit, Inflation and More
items.content: In his annual letter to shareholders, Jamie Dimon, the chief executive of JPMorgan Chase, said investors and businesses faced a series of challenges.

items.title: ‘Good to be Home’: Savannah Guthrie Returns to ‘Today’
items.content: The anchor joined the show’s cast on Monday for the first time since the disappearance of her 84-year-old mother, Nancy, who remains missing.

items.title: What Does an Ultra-Luxury First Class Ticket Get You? Flying in a Frictionless Bubble.
items.content: A writer reports from inside the premium bubble, where there’s no such thing as too much, petty annoyances are nonexistent and the real world never intrudes.

items.title: Oil Seesaws After Trump’s Latest Threats on Iran
items.content: President Trump taunted Iranian leaders on Sunday, threatening to escalate attacks if the Strait of Hormuz was not reopened.
